title: Search interest rises for Nico Williams ahead of Spain vs Argentina final
description: Nico Williams is trending in the UK with over 10,000 searches. News sources discuss his absence from the Spain vs Argentina World Cup final and his international records.

sources.title: Nico Williams: "Me he imaginado mil veces marcando el gol de la final"
¿Por qué no juega Nico Williams en España vs. Argentina por la final del Mundial 2026?
Los récords internacionales de Mikel Merino y Nico Williams

sections.heading: Search Trends in the UK
paragraphs: According to Google Trends data, the search term "Nico Williams" has a reported search lower bound of 10,000 in the GB region. The trend feed was published on July 19, 2026.

sections.heading: World Cup Final Coverage
paragraphs: Fútbol Centroamérica published a report questioning why Nico Williams is not playing in the Spain vs. Argentina match for the final of the 2026 World Cup.

sections.heading: Player Statements
paragraphs: Onda Cero reported comments from Nico Williams, stating that he has imagined a thousand times scoring the goal of the final.

sections.heading: International Records
paragraphs: Noticias de Navarra published an article discussing the international records held by Mikel Merino and Nico Williams.

faq.q: What is the context of the recent news about Nico Williams?
faq.a: Fútbol Centroamérica reported on the Spain vs. Argentina final of the 2026 World Cup, specifically asking why Nico Williams is not playing.
